title: Conversationally Speaking
author: Alan Garner
subline: The lost art of small talk that builds everything.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two stick figures facing each other. A long horizontal 'bubble cloud' between them containing 6 tiny white squares (the words). The square that contains the 'real conversation' is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left figure -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="-580" cy="-200" r="50"/>
      <line x1="-580" y1="-150" x2="-580" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="-580" y1="-100" x2="-640" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="-580" y1="-100" x2="-520" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="-580" y1="80" x2="-620" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-580" y1="80" x2="-540" y2="200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Right figure -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="580" cy="-200" r="50"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="-150" x2="580" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="-100" x2="520" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="-100" x2="640" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="80" x2="540" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="80" x2="620" y2="200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The conversation cloud: 6 squares between them -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-450" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
      <rect x="-310" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
      <rect x="-170" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
      <rect x="-30" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
      <rect x="110" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
      <rect x="250" y="-220" width="120" height="80"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Tiny 'words' inside each box -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="-430" y1="-200" x2="-350" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="-290" y1="-200" x2="-210" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="-150" y1="-200" x2="-70" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="-10" y1="-200" x2="70" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="130" y1="-200" x2="210" y2="-200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The RED box (the real conversation) -->
    <rect x="250" y="-220" width="120" height="80" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="270" y1="-200" x2="350" y2="-200" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">ONE OF SIX IS THE REAL ONE</text>
</svg>
rationale: Two stick figures in profile facing each other, with a horizontal strip of 6 small word-bubbles between them. The 6th (rightmost) is filled red — the one that matters, the one small talk leads to. The other 5 are hairline ash. Title 320px uppercase, two lines, weight 500. The composition is a conversation diagram.
